quoted_text:
Energy markets have been enormously conditioned over the last 2 months that all escalation is fake and just a setup for more news that will dump them. New longs (in oil) are very skittish to enter.

At the same time, short sellers are aggressively defending positions.

It will take a little time for the market to understand the whole thing has flipped.

Unless Trump continues jawboning that it really is inverse now. Or there's a singular event (like a tanker hit in bab, or some other critical in
